title: ⚠️ 使用说明：推荐 1-Stage 直出（默认）
description: 默认走单阶段：模型内部自行分析季节类型，一次生成综合形象报告。2-Stage 保留为可选（当用户明确需要独立色彩诊断卡时才用）。

workflow.optional: 2-Stage：Stage 1 色彩诊断卡 + Stage 2 综合报告（用户明确要两张图时）
workflow.reference_image: required（正面素颜自拍，自然光，无滤镜，无重度妆容）
workflow.why_1_stage_ok: GPT Image 2 edit 可在单次调用中先内部分析季节类型再生成报告，无需拆分。模型自行保持色彩逻辑一致性。
workflow.when_to_use_2_stage: 用户明确要求'先出色彩诊断卡，再出综合报告'时；或需要在两图之间确认季节类型时。

execution_steps_1stage: Step 1: 确认用户已提供素颜参考图（正面，自然光，无滤镜）
Step 2: 运行「1-Stage 综合形象报告」prompt + 参考图
execution_steps_2stage: Step 2: 运行 Stage 1 prompt + 参考图 → 得到色彩诊断卡
Step 3: 记录 Stage 1 输出图中的季节类型（如 Soft Autumn）
Step 4: 将季节类型填入 Stage 2 prompt 的 [SEASON TYPE FROM STAGE 1] 占位符
Step 5: 运行 Stage 2 prompt + 原始参考图（不是 Stage 1 的图！）
content: 此条目为工作流说明，不含可执行 prompt。

title: 【推荐】1-Stage 综合形象报告 / Personal Image Report（风格精准版）
description: 单阶段直出综合形象报告。视觉风格严格对齐参考图：米白哑光底 × 衬线/无衬线双层排版 × 上英下中双语 × 细线分割 × 莫兰迪大地色系。需参考图。GPT Image 2 edit。

style_anchors.background: Off-white cream (#FAF8F5), matte paper quality — not pure white
style_anchors.typography_headers: Serif display font, elegant fashion-editorial weight
style_anchors.typography_body: Clean sans-serif, medium weight, high legibility
style_anchors.bilingual: English headline (larger, wider letter-spacing) above / Chinese subtitle below (smaller, gray)
style_anchors.dividers: Hairline 0.5px gray rules + generous whitespace — no thick borders
style_anchors.photo_style: No borders, unified soft-box studio lighting, grid-equal sizing
style_anchors.color_palette: Muted earth tones + Morandy palette, low saturation, mid value — season-appropriate
style_anchors.overall_vibe: Kinfolk magazine × Korean professional beauty clinic × Notion dashboard

content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate a single comprehensive Korean-style Personal Image Report.

INTERNAL ANALYSIS (do not output as text — use to inform all design decisions):
Analyze the subject's features:
- Skin undertone: warm/cool/neutral
- Skin depth: light/medium/deep
- Skin chroma: bright/muted
- Hair color temperature
- Eye color clarity
Determine Personal Color Season (12-type system):
  Spring: Bright Spring / True Spring / Light Spring
  Summer: Light Summer / True Summer / Soft Summer
  Autumn: Soft Autumn / True Autumn / Dark Autumn
  Winter: Dark Winter / True Winter / Bright Winter
Use this season to govern ALL color choices throughout the entire report.

VISUAL STYLE (strictly follow — this is the most important constraint):
- Background: Off-white cream, matte paper quality (NOT pure white)
- Headers: Serif display font (fashion editorial elegance)
- Body text: Clean sans-serif, medium weight
- Bilingual: English title above (larger, wider letter-spacing) + Chinese below (smaller, muted gray)
- Section dividers: Hairline 0.5px gray rules + generous breathing whitespace
- Photos: No borders, unified soft-box studio lighting, equal-sized grid thumbnails
- Color palette: Muted earth tones, Morandy range, low saturation — consistent with diagnosed season
- Overall vibe: Kinfolk magazine × Korean professional beauty clinic × Notion dashboard
- Avoid: pure white background, thick borders, decorative flourishes, oversaturated colors, cheap magazine feel

LAYOUT (portrait format, 3:4 ratio):

── TITLE BAR ──
Title: 'PERSONAL IMAGE REPORT' (serif, centered, elegant)
Subtitle below: '个人形象诊断总报告' (sans-serif, smaller, muted)
Season badge: '[SEASON] / [中文季节型]' as a refined filled pill in season-appropriate muted color

── SECTION 1: HERO ROW (3 columns, hairline dividers) ──
Col A (25%): Subject's portrait — exact face from reference photo, natural lighting, no-border, full-length or bust crop
Col B (40%):
  Season type + 3 characteristic description lines (Chinese)
  COLOR PROFILE: 3 gradient bars (HUE / VALUE / CHROMA) with dot position indicator
  BEST COLORS: 2 rows of 8 filled circles, season-appropriate muted palette
Col C (35%):
  'STYLE KEYWORDS' header
  8 bilingual tags (English above, Chinese below) in rounded light-gray pill shapes, 2×4 grid

── SECTION 2: OUTFIT STYLE (full-width horizontal strip) ──
Title: 'OUTFIT STYLE' (serif) / '穿搭风格' (sans-serif, smaller, below)
6 equal-width fashion photos in horizontal row, subject's face on styled model bodies
Outfits in season-harmonious muted colors, varied silhouettes
Caption strip below: 3-4 silhouette keywords in light-gray text

── SECTION 3: MAKEUP GUIDE + ACCESSORIES (side by side, hairline divider between) ──
Left (45%) — MAKEUP GUIDE / '妆容指南':
  4 subsections: BROW / EYE / BLUSH / LIP
  Each: facial close-up thumbnail + 3 color dot swatches with bilingual names
Right (55%) — ACCESSORIES / '配饰建议':
  3 face thumbnails with different earring/necklace combinations
  2 small product image references below

── SECTION 4: GLASSES / CONTACT LENSES / HAIR COLOR (3-column, hairline dividers) ──
Col 1 — GLASSES / '眼镜':
  3 face thumbnails with different frame styles (same-size grid)
  Frame style names: English + Chinese
Col 2 — CONTACT LENSES / '美瞳':
  3 eye close-up thumbnails with different lens colors
  Color names: English + Chinese
Col 3 — HAIR COLOR / '发色':
  4 hair swatch strips, season-appropriate warm/cool tones
  Color names: English + Chinese

── SECTION 5: HAIRSTYLE / BODY SHAPE (2-column) ──
Left — HAIRSTYLE / '发型':
  4 equal-sized face thumbnails, different cuts
  Each labeled: English name + Chinese below
Right — BODY SHAPE GUIDE / '体型指南':
  Simple line-art body silhouette diagram
  4 small recommended silhouette thumbnails
  ✓ shape keywords in Chinese

── SECTION 6: RECOMMENDATIONS + AVOID (full-width, 2-column) ──
Left — KEY RECOMMENDATIONS / '搭配建议':
  5 rows: [minimal icon] English tip · Chinese explanation
Right — AVOID / '避免':
  5 color swatches or pattern examples showing what conflicts with season
  Each with brief Chinese reason

QUALITY:
- Subject's exact facial features consistent across ALL thumbnail appearances
- All text legible, correctly spelled, bilingual throughout
- Season color logic strictly consistent from hero row to bottom section
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality, crisp typography

title: 【可选 2-Stage】Stage 1：色彩诊断卡 / Color Diagnosis Card
description: 独立色彩诊断卡（仅当用户需要单独这张卡时使用）。含季节判定、色彩属性、Drape Test 对比、最佳色板。风格同参考图：米白底、衬线标题、双语排版。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate a standalone Korean-style personal color diagnosis card.

VISUAL STYLE:
- Background: Off-white cream, matte paper quality
- Typography: Serif for headers + sans-serif for labels, bilingual (English above / Chinese below)
- Dividers: Hairline gray rules + whitespace
- Photos: No borders, soft-box studio lighting
- Palette: Season-appropriate muted colors, Morandy range
- Vibe: Kinfolk × Korean beauty clinic, refined and professional

FORMAT: Portrait 3:4

ANALYSIS (internal, governs all color choices):
Determine subject's season from: skin undertone, depth, chroma, hair temperature, eye clarity.
12-type system: Bright/True/Light Spring; Light/True/Soft Summer; Soft/True/Dark Autumn; Dark/True/Bright Winter.

LAYOUT:

HEADER:
'PERSONAL COLOR DIAGNOSIS' (serif, centered) / '个人色彩诊断' (sans, smaller, below)
Season badge: '[SEASON] / [中文]' in muted season-tone pill

ROW 1 (2 columns, hairline divider):
Left (42%): Subject portrait (exact face, no border, soft-box lighting)
  Below: 2-line italic tagline in English + Chinese describing natural vibe
Right (58%):
  COLOR PROFILE: 3 gradient bars (HUE / VALUE / CHROMA) + dot indicator
  BEST COLORS: 2 rows × 8-9 muted season circles

ROW 2 — DRAPE TEST / '色布测试' (full width):
Left mini panel: subject face + BEST drape fabric swatch → '✓ BEST' label with color name
Right mini panel: subject face + AVOID drape swatch → '✗ AVOID' label with color name

ROW 3 — STYLE KEYWORDS (full width):
8 bilingual pill tags in 2×4 grid, light-gray background pills

QUALITY: GPT Image 2, max quality, crisp bilingual text, no garbled characters

title: 【简版】4-Card Variant（4 张独立分析卡，来自 @zhongying14）
description: 更轻量的方案，4 张独立卡各聚焦一个维度。可并行出图，适合快速交付。风格同参考图：米白底，双语，干净网格。
content:
Generate 4 separate personal analysis cards from the uploaded portrait. Run these 4 calls independently (can be parallel). All cards share the same visual style: off-white cream background, serif headers + sans-serif labels, bilingual (English above / Chinese below), hairline dividers, no photo borders, soft-box unified lighting.

Card 1 — HAIRSTYLE ANALYSIS / '发型分析':
Show 4 side-by-side hairstyle comparisons. Each panel: subject's face with rendered hairstyle, style name (English + Chinese), ✓ recommended / ✗ not recommended indicator. Include both flattering and unflattering examples for contrast. Visual-first, short labels only. 3:4.

Card 2 — COLOUR ANALYSIS / '色彩诊断':
Determine the subject's Personal Color Season (12-type Korean system). Show: season badge (bilingual pill), drape test comparison (best vs avoid fabric swatches with subject's face), color profile bars (HUE/VALUE/CHROMA), best color palette (8 circles), style keywords (8 bilingual tags). Professional, analytical, Korean beauty clinic aesthetic. 3:4.

Card 3 — EYEWEAR ANALYSIS / '眼镜分析':
Show 4-5 frame style comparisons. Each: subject's face with rendered glasses, frame name (English + Chinese), compatibility indicator (✓ / △ / ✗). Diverse frame shapes: round, rectangular, cat-eye, oversized, rimless. 3:4.

Card 4 — OUTFIT & COLOUR COORDINATION / '穿搭色彩分析':
Show 5-6 outfit comparisons, each featuring the subject in different color tones and pattern types. Clearly distinguish season-harmonious looks vs clashing looks. Include color family names and harmony indicators. Season-appropriate muted palette for recommended outfits; contrasting vivid/wrong-tone examples for avoid section. 3:4.
